text: Stepping into this space, I'm greeted by vivid neon blues and cool glass, instantly sensing a deliberate boundary between the ordinary world outside and the curated mystery inside. As I enter further, I am drawn to the bold R+D wall—its luminous textures, glowing purples, and immersive displays. Curiosity and a touch of anticipation rise in me. I feel like both participant and observer in an experimental liminal zone, where technology and human intent blend. This place feels quietly alive, waiting for me to connect, reflect, and contemplate the intersections of research, artifice, and self-awareness.
